message:
feat(web): add error boundary for lesson rendering

- Create ErrorBoundary class component in components/ui/error-boundary.tsx
- Wrap lesson content in lesson-content.tsx with the error boundary
- Show user-friendly error UI with retry and navigation options
- Display error details in development mode for debugging
- Prevent entire page crash when lesson components throw errors

Closes: kyq4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
